extracted.full_content:
We’re Hiring: Full Stack Developer (PHP + React)
💼 Company: #Forcecraver
📍 Location: Remote
📄 Employment Type: Contract
👨‍💻 Experience: 5–6 Years
🇮🇳 Candidates must be based in India only

⸻

🔧 Key Skills Required

PHP | React JS | JavaScript | TypeScript
RDBMS (MySQL) | Database Design
RESTful APIs | AWS | Cypress | Elasticsearch

⸻

🌟 Role Overview

We are looking for a passionate Full Stack Developer to build scalable, high-performance web platforms. You will work on cutting-edge technologies including AI/ML integrations, LLMs, and modern cloud-based architectures.

⸻

🚀 Project Highlights

✨ Work with a prestigious global client
✨ Exposure to LLMs, RAG pipelines & vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS)
✨ Build cloud-native solutions on AWS
✨ Agile environment with strong collaboration across Product, Engineering & Data teams

⸻

🎯 Key Responsibilities
	•	Develop end-to-end features from scratch
	•	Design scalable APIs and optimize system performance
	•	Collaborate with product & design teams in agile setup
	•	Mentor junior developers and guide technical decisions
	•	Contribute to AI roadmap & LLM integrations

⸻

✅ Requirements
	•	Strong backend experience in PHP & API development
	•	Hands-on with React & modern JavaScript
	•	Solid understanding of MySQL & database design
	•	Experience with REST APIs and system design
	•	Exposure to AI/LLMs or API-based AI integrations is a plus
	•	Experience with AWS, TypeScript, Cypress, Elasticsearch (preferred)

⸻

🎁 Why Join Us?

✔ Work on latest technologies & AI-driven systems
✔ Challenging and high-impact projects
✔ Opportunity to work with large global clients
✔ Strong focus on learning & development

⸻

📞 Please reach out to me at +919899634637 or jbhatia@forcecraver.com to discuss further.
🔔 Follow @Jitender Bhatia @Forcecraver Technologies for more job updates.
extracted.role_summary: We are looking for a passionate Full Stack Developer to build scalable, high-performance web platforms.

extracted.full_content:
🚀 We’re Hiring: Data / GenAI Engineers (#Forcecraver)

We are looking for experienced Data / Generative AI Engineers to join our Professional Services team on a contract basis and deliver production-grade AI solutions.

📍 Location: Remote (India Only)
🕒 Shift: 8 AM – 4 PM EST

🔹 What You’ll Work On:
	•	Conversational AI assistants
	•	RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems
	•	Document processing automation
	•	AI-powered data analytics platforms

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
	•	Build GenAI solutions using Amazon Bedrock & LLMs (Claude, OpenAI, Cohere)
	•	Develop RAG pipelines with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, OpenSearch)
	•	Design serverless architectures using AWS Lambda, API Gateway
	•	Create APIs (FastAPI/Flask) for real-time AI systems
	•	Implement prompt engineering, embeddings, and AI agents
	•	Work directly with clients in agile delivery environments

🔹 Must-Have Skills:
	•	Strong Python (3.9+) expertise
	•	Hands-on with Amazon Bedrock & LLM integrations
	•	Experience with LangChain / LlamaIndex / AI agents
	•	Solid AWS serverless architecture experience
	•	Vector DB & RAG implementation experience
	•	REST API development

🔹 Experience Required:
	•	5+ years in software engineering
	•	2+ years in AWS (production deployments)
	•	1+ year in Generative AI / LLMs / RAG systems

💡 India-based candidates only

📩 Please reach out to me at +919899634637 or jbhatia@forcecraver.com to discuss further.
🔔 Follow @Jitender Bhatia @Forcecraver Technologies for more job updates.
extracted.role_summary: We are looking for experienced Data / Generative AI Engineers to join our Professional Services team on a contract basis and deliver production-grade AI solutions.
